creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to vermaden from comment #4)

You're correct that taking years to respond to PRs is unproductive.

However, you're criticizing one of the people who is trying to fix the problem by going through old PRs to see if they are still relevant.  I have tried to do that before, and after a while, had to go do other things, due to the comments.

The underlying problem is that we get far too many PRs (100+/day) than we have volunteers to go through them.  I take some responsibility for having tried to fix this problem, but failed.

tl:dr; we have a personnel problem and no easy way to fix it.
